note: Light-doc submodule of genpass (test-support module under tests/modules/). Recipe-only: text-graded, no site mutation.

evals.prompt: What is the genpass_batch submodule for, and which Drupal hook does it implement to do its job? Name the hook.
evals.expected_output: genpass_batch is a test-support submodule of genpass that starts a Batch API job on every account creation, via an OOP hook_user_insert (#[Hook('user_insert')] in UserInsertBatch), to verify genpass works while a batch is in flight.

evals.prompt: Which module does the genpass_batch submodule depend on, and does it add any configuration, permissions, or routes of its own?
evals.expected_output: genpass_batch depends on genpass (genpass:genpass) and adds no config, permissions, routes, or services of its own — it only registers a user_insert batch hook.

evals.prompt: In the genpass_batch submodule, which Batch API function does its user_insert hook call to queue its work?
evals.expected_output: It calls batch_set() with a single operation (batchTask) and a batchFinished callback.
